cta.coverImgAlt: Infographic about home ventilation: air exchange and flow, whole-house MVHR system, benefits of good ventilation such as filtered air and moisture control, pitfalls of inadequate ventilation including mold and trapped pollutants, and the system science with heat recovery up to 90% efficiency.
cta.ctaImgAlt: Diagram: Ventilation in action – whole-house MVHR system showing supply and exhaust air flow, heat recovery unit, and continuous cycle for improved health and comfort.

ventilationConcepts.title: Healthy Home Ventilation
ventilationConcepts.subtitle: Understand air exchange, benefits, and why good ventilation matters.
ventilationConcepts.airExchangeAlt: Diagram of continuous air exchange and supply vs exhaust flow
ventilationConcepts.airExchangeDesc: Continuous cycle of fresh air in and stale air out. ACH (Air Changes per Hour) keeps indoor air healthy.
ventilationConcepts.pitfallsAlt: Causes and consequences of poor ventilation in a sealed home
ventilationConcepts.pitfallsDesc: Trapped pollutants, excess moisture, and health impacts. Good ventilation prevents these problems.
ventilationConcepts.systemScienceImgAlt: Diagram: balanced air exchange, heat recovery in action, and key scientific benefits including improved health.
ventilationConcepts.systemScienceDesc: Balanced air exchange, heat recovery, and optimal humidity support mold prevention, energy efficiency, and improved health.
